params_used.custom_text: // This is a 3-input, 6-to-1 demultiplexer with 32-bit wide inputs. It selects one of the three inputs (a0, a1, a2) to output based on a 6-bit selection address (sel_addr). If sel_addr does not match the specified values (6'b110000 for a0, 6'b110001 for a1, and 6'b110010 for a2), it outputs the corresponding input; otherwise, it outputs a default value of zero.
